---
title: "Welcome"
description: "A short note introducing this blog."
date: 2026-05-03
categories: [personal, website]
author: Zheng Zhou
---

This blog will collect short notes on research ideas, statistics, machine learning, quantitative finance, and tools that I find useful.

I plan to use it as a lightweight place for writing down thoughts that are not yet papers, but are still worth organizing carefully.
